comment: Pinned firmware images Bert downloads on demand. Update this file when publishing a new firmware release; bert flash-firmware will then pull the new image. See docs/firmware-release.md for the maintainer workflow.

hci.description: Zephyr hci_uart sample for nRF52840 USB Dongle. Built with Zephyr v3.7.0 + nRF Connect SDK toolchain. Exposes a virtual COM port speaking HCI at 1 Mbaud.

sniffer.description: Use Nordic's bundled firmware via `nrfutil install ble-sniffer`; Bert auto-discovers it under $NRFUTIL_HOME/share/nrfutil-ble-sniffer/firmware/.
